summary: Modular Architecture Refactoring Test Complete - Backend: 39/39 passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly, WooCommerce dialog has catalog selector and auto-sync switch. App refactored from monolithic server.py to modular routes, models, and services.

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in Login.jsx - existing issue with navigation logic
Duplicate nav elements (mobile + desktop) - may cause selector issues in automated tests

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - returns 400 for duplicate email
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user info
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns all WooCommerce fields (woocommerce_stores, woocommerce_connected, woocommerce_auto_sync, woocommerce_total_synced)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/sync-status - returns suppliers and woocommerce_stores arrays
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stock-alerts - returns low_stock and out_of_stock
Backend: POST /api/catalogs - creates catalog with name, description, is_default
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules - lists catalog margin rules
Backend: POST /api/catalogs without name - returns 422 validation error
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs - creates config with catalog_id and auto_sync_enabled
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs/{id}/sync - returns 400 when no catalog associated
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all as read
Frontend: /login page loads with email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: /register page loads with name, email, password, confirm, company fields
Frontend: Login redirects to dashboard on success
Frontend: /dashboard loads with stats cards (Proveedores, Productos, Catálogos, Stock Bajo, Sin Stock, Cambios Precio)
Frontend: /dashboard shows Stock Bajo and Sin Stock sections
Frontend: /suppliers page loads with 'Añadir Proveedor' button
Frontend: /products page loads with search, filters, 'Importar Productos' button
Frontend: /catalogs page loads with stats and 'Crear Catálogo' button
Frontend: /woocommerce page loads with stats (Tiendas Conectadas, Catálogos Disponibles)
Frontend: /woocommerce 'Añadir Tienda' dialog has catalog selector (data-testid='woo-catalog-select')
Frontend: /notifications page loads with filter buttons (Todas, Sin leer)
Frontend: Sidebar shows all navigation items
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx has React setState warning during render - should use useEffect for navigation redirect
Sidebar.jsx renders duplicate nav elements for mobile and desktop - consider using visibility classes instead of duplicate elements to avoid selector conflicts

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, all key elements present)

seed_data_creation: Created test users, catalogs, suppliers, WooCommerce configs during tests - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: App refactored to modular architecture. All backend routes in /app/backend/routes/. Models in /app/backend/models/schemas.py. Services in /app/backend/services/. WooCommerce dialog has data-testid='woo-catalog-select' and data-testid='woo-auto-sync-switch'. Dashboard shows WooCommerce sync status when stores exist. Notifications page has data-testid='filter-all' and data-testid='filter-unread'. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_api.py covers all major APIs.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This is feature verification testing for modular refactoring
